saveAppStructure

saveAppStructure.Rd

Wrapper for qs2::qs_save(). Saves an appStructure object as a qs-file using qs2.

Usage

saveAppStructure(appStructure, filePath = "./appStructure.qs", ...)

Arguments

appStructure

(list: NULL) appStructure object, i.e. a named list of ShinyModule objects or (named) lists containing (named) ShinyModule objects. Representing the navigation (side) bar of the shiny app.

filePath

(character: "./appStructure.qs") Path to the qs-file, containing the appStructure, or where to write the appStructure to.

...

Extra arguments for qs2::qs_save()

Value

NULL invisible

On this page
